name: @nexa/platform
description: Nexa platform services — run scripts from this folder or cd into each service.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix event-bus && npm run build --prefix event-bus && npm install --prefix telemetry && npm run build --prefix telemetry && npm install --prefix identity-read-model && npm run build --prefix identity-read-model && npm install --prefix notifications-service && npm install --prefix media-service && npm install --prefix consumers && npm run build --prefix consumers
